---
title: "Git Collaboration Tips"
author: "Spencer Fern & Ann Holmes"
format: html
---


## Git Collaboration Tips

### Tips: Spencer

Communicate regularly

Avoid conflicts (both in git and real life)

Stay hydrated and well-fed to avoid burnout

### Tips: Ann Holmes

1. Communicate and coordinate
2. Enjoy the process
3. Supplement with caffeine when necessary

## How to Create a Merge Conflict 

### Merge Conflict: Owner Resolves


I'm a big fan of chicken alfredo

Ann is creating a conflict for resolution 


### Merge Conflict: Collaborator Resolves


I'm not really big on chicken alfredo

I'm really only here to cause conflicts, truthfully


## Summary: How to Avoid Merge Conflicts

<Owner and Collaborator use best practices to write some concluding tips here!>
